cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 光海–孝宗
cover.subtitle:
중립을 버린 대가,
삼전도에서 끝났다.
cover.imagePrompt: Early 17th century Korean illustration. ONE Korean king (King Injo) in deep crimson royal robe kneeling on a stone-paved riverbank at Samjeondo, head bowed low. Behind him: snowy bare trees and an overcast winter sky. In the distance: a raised dais suggested as silhouette only. Composition: solitary humbled figure, weight of surrender. Color: deep crimson robe + ink-black + cool gray winter + hanji beige sky. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 광해군 즉위. 경기도 대동법 최초 시행.
삼전도 항복. 청과 군신관계, 세자 인질.

outro.tip_headline:
"정묘 = 형제 / 병자 = 군신"
관계를 헷갈리지 마라.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 정묘호란(1627·형제관계)과 병자호란(1636·군신관계)의 구분이 핵심이다. 광해군의 폐모살제가 인조반정의 명분, 효종의 나선 정벌(1654·1658)도 빈출 포인트.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized snow-capped mountain silhouette suggesting Namhansanseong fortress, simple ink-line. RIGHT: a small Joseon royal hat silhouette bowed forward. Cream #F2EDE3 base + cool gray #475569 accent + crimson #B91C1C detail. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
